name: Virtual Hunting Experience
short_description: Hunting with no limits. From blasting chickens on a farm to flying in a helicopter hunting for boar and floating down alligator infested rivers, Virtual Hunting Experience provides all hunters with their preferred game!
detailed_description:
Virtual Hunting Experience offers hunters the chance at unique hunting simulations full of animals and with no limits. Be careful because not all animals are friendly! Hunt over 6 Full hunt locations for over 30+ animal species, collect trophy animals, and unlock new weapons.

-Choose between Day and Night hunting which change the animal that spawn and some animal behaviors.

- Full hunt Journal to keep track of trophy animals and other hunting stats.

-Score breakdown after each hunt, rack up big money to buy new weapons.

-Choose from 6 different locations and shoot for high scores!

-5 Unique challenge modes to test even the most skilled hunters.

- Steam Leaderboards for those who really wanna show off their skills!
